'''shavofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foeniculin|foeniculin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foeniculin|foeniculin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shavofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævefeth|shævefeth]] || [[word:shævefej|shævefej]] || [[word:shævefesh|shævefesh]] || [[word:shævefe|shævefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavovofoth|shavovofoth]] || [[word:shavovofoj|shavovofoj]] || [[word:shavovofosh|shavovofosh]] || [[word:shavovofo|shavovofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavofoth|shavofoth]] || [[word:shavofoj|shavofoj]] || [[word:shavofosh|shavofosh]] || [[word:shavofo|shavofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavoffoth|shavoffoth]] || [[word:shavoffoj|shavoffoj]] || [[word:shavoffosh|shavoffosh]] || [[word:shavoffof|shavoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavofotho|shavofotho]] || [[word:shavofojo|shavofojo]] || [[word:shavofosho|shavofosho]] || [[word:shavofoko|shavofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavofoth|shavofoth]] || [[word:shavofoj|shavofoj]] || [[word:shavofosh|shavofosh]] || [[word:shavofo|shavofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavofothol|shavofothol]] || [[word:shavofojol|shavofojol]] || [[word:shavofoshol|shavofoshol]] || [[word:shavofokol|shavofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavofothotho|shavofothotho]] || [[word:shavofojojo|shavofojojo]] || [[word:shavofoshosho|shavofoshosho]] || [[word:shavofoko|shavofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavofothon|shavofothon]] || [[word:shavofojon|shavofojon]] || [[word:shavofoshon|shavofoshon]] || [[word:shavofokon|shavofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavofothoro|shavofothoro]] || [[word:shavofojoro|shavofojoro]] || [[word:shavofoshoro|shavofoshoro]] || [[word:shavofokoro|shavofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
